scene_description:
Foreground:  
- The central area features a dark gray asphalt road surface with visible cracks and dark patches. A white solid line runs along the left edge (left foreground) and right edge (right foreground), while a single yellow dashed line marks the center (center foreground).  

Midground:  
- To the left of the road (left midground), a light brown gravel shoulder extends, covered in sparse, dry yellow grass and scattered small green shrubs. Vertical wooden fence posts (approximately 1–2 meters tall, made of wood) are spaced along this shoulder, with wire strung between them.  
- To the right of the road (right midground), a similar light brown gravel shoulder is present, with patches of dry grass and denser clusters of small green shrubs. Vertical wooden fence posts (same material and height as left side) are spaced along this shoulder, with wire between them.  
- The road continues into the midground with the white edge lines and yellow center line maintaining their positions.  

Background:  
- The horizon (center background) shows a flat, arid landscape with faint, low-lying hills or mountains visible on the horizon line. The sky (top of the image) is clear blue with no clouds.  

Text & Signs: None visible.  
Infrastructure (beyond fence posts): No utility poles, street lamps, traffic lights, fire hydrants, bollards, or guardrails are present.  
Vehicles & Plates: No vehicles or license plates are visible.  
Buildings & Architecture: No buildings or architectural structures are present.  
Vegetation & Terrain: The terrain is flat and arid, with dry yellow grass covering the ground and scattered small green shrubs. Distant low-lying hills are visible on the horizon.

details.name: yellow dashed line
details.reason: The color and pattern of center road markings can help distinguish between different regional road standards.
details.focused_description: The yellow dashed line is a series of short, evenly spaced yellow segments painted on the center of the asphalt road. It is straight, with a consistent width, and the color is bright yellow. The line is made of road paint, appears well-maintained, and is positioned along the longitudinal center of the road.

details.name: wooden fence posts
details.reason: The type of fencing used can be characteristic of specific rural or agricultural regions.
details.focused_description: The wooden fence posts are vertical, cylindrical, and made of weathered wood. Their colors are a mix of brown and gray, showing signs of aging and exposure. The posts appear worn, with rough textures and some splintering. No visible text is present on the posts. They are arranged in a line across the image.
